text: While working near the funnel, check with the officer on the bridge that he has informed the

options.text: Engine room to switch off air/steam to whistle
Engine room to switch off power on deck

explanation: When working near the funnel, especially if maintenance involves noise or potential steam release, it's crucial to coordinate with the bridge. The bridge must inform the engine room to temporarily stop the whistle (using steam or air) to prevent confusion or injury to personnel on deck.
